title: papaver atlanticum subsp. mesatlanticum
intro: Papaver atlanticum subsp. mesatlanticum is a subspecies of the Atlantic poppy, a perennial plant belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant contains alkaloids, such as papaverine, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain, inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Papaver atlanticum subsp. mesatlanticum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
